Source: Power Pages Release Updates
URL: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/power-pages/release-updates
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Power Pages Release Updates

## Release Plans
- 2023 release wave 2 plan
- 2023 release wave 1 plan
- 2022 release wave 2 plan

## Infrastructure
Uses Azure Web Apps, Traffic Manager, Service Bus, Key Vault, Storage, Microsoft Entra ID.

## Privacy Notice
By enabling website capabilities for Dynamics 365, data such as customer name, product name, case number, or custom entity data can be exposed through an external-facing Dynamics 365 website.
Data stored in Azure Web Apps for caching and local hard drive for search functionality.
Tenant administrator enables via Power Platform admin center.

Page last updated (ms.date): 2023-03-21
Document last updated: 2025-05-12
